movie.actors: Wesley Snipes, Gary Busey, Yancy Butler, Michael Jeter
movie.plot: A tough cop teams up with a professional skydiver to capture a renegade computer hacker on the run from the law.
movie.title: Drop Zone
movie.writer: Tony Griffin (story), Guy Manos (story), Peter Barsocchini (story), Peter Barsocchini (screenplay), John Bishop (screenplay)
